pr.title: Record: FarnsworthEngine v1 — TTT + 11L Int6 MLP3x, val_bpb=1.1303

output.summary: Apply test-time training over an 11-layer MLP3x Int6 model with SmearGate/BigramHash, Muon+SWA, NTK-RoPE, and sliding-window eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts all weights via SGD on the validation shard before sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: Int6 MLP3x with SmearGate and BigramHash features
Muon optimizer + SWA with sliding-window eval and NTK-RoPE
